zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Somerled於1185年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特時，她的父親Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles38歲，母親Fonia Moray40歲。她和Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1240年在蘇格蘭享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Somerled was born in 1185, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, was 38 and her mother, Fonia Moray, was 40. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall. She died in 1240, in Scotland, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Somerled est née en 1185, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Fonia Moray, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Morven, Argyll, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Somerled 1185 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles 38 und ihre Mutter Fonia Moray 40. Sie hatte mit Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Scotland.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall. Morì nel 1240, nel Scotland, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Somerledが1185年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトで生まれた時，父Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Islesは38歳，母Fonia Morayは40歳であった。彼女はMalcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowallとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1240年にスコットランドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Somerled(이)가 1185년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Fonia Moray(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 스컷랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Somerled родилась в 1185 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ragnall Mac Somairle Lord of the Isles было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Fonia Moray, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Malcolm MacFerchar - Lord of Cowall. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет.
